sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: MPC Q3 2025: R&M 강세로 조정 EBITDA 32억 달러, 자본환원 9억 2,600만 달러·MPLX 배분 인상

keyPoints.text: 3분기 순이익(MPC 귀속분) 14억 달러, 조정 순이익 9억 1,500만 달러(EPS 3.01달러)를 기록했다. 조정 EBITDA는 32억 달러로 전년 동기 25억 달러 대비 크게 증가했다.
자사주 매입 6억 5,000만 달러를 포함해 총 9억 2,600만 달러의 자본을 주주에게 환원했으며, 분기 배당을 10% 인상했다. MPLX의 12.5% 배분 인상으로 MPC에 대한 연간 예상 배분액은 28억 달러에 달한다.

businessChanges.text: MPLX가 28억 달러의 연간 배분을 MPC에 제공하여 배당 및 자체 자본지출을 커버하고 추가 자본 배분의 원천이 될 것으로 기대하고 있다.

financialHighlights.text: R&M 세그먼트 조정 EBITDA 18억 달러로 전년 동기 11억 달러 대비 크게 증가했으며, R&M 마진은 전년 동기 14.63달러/배럴 대비 상승했다.
정제 정기보수 비용 4억 달러(전년 동기 2억 8,700만 달러)가 세그먼트 조정 EBITDA에서 제외됐으며, 총 조정 EBITDA는 32억 달러였다.

watchItems.text: MPLX 12.5% 배분 인상이 지속되는 가운데 R&M 마진의 Q4 유지 여부와 정기보수 비용 추이가 다음 분기 핵심 확인 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 mpcq32025earningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Marathon Petroleum Corp. Reports Third-Quarter 2025 Results • Third-quarter net income attributable to MPC of $1.4 billion, or $4.51 per diluted share, adjusted net income of $915 million, or $3.01 per diluted share • $3.2 billion of adjusted EBITDA, driven by strong Refining & Marketing execution; and continued Midstream growth • $926 million of capital returned, inclusive of $650 million of share repurchases • Announced 10% quarterly dividend increase • MPLX’s 12.5% quarterly distribution increase will result in $2.8 billion of expected annual distributions to MPC FINDLAY, Ohio, Nov. 4, 2025 –  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.4 billion = 14억 달러; $915 million = 9억 1,500만 달러; $3.2 billion = 32억 달러; $926 million = 9억 2,600만 달러; $650 million = 6억 5,000만 달러; $2.8 billion = 28억 달러; $622 million = 6억 2,200만 달러; $1.4 = 1.4달러; $915 = 915달러; $2.8 = 2.8달러; $3.01 = 3.01달러; $3.2 = 3.2달러; $926 = 926달러; $650 = 650달러; $622 = 622달러.

per diluted share, for the third quarter of 2024. Adjusted net income was $915 million, or $3.01 per diluted share, for the third quarter of 2025. Adjustments are shown in the accompanying release tables. In the third quarter of 2025, the company recorded a $56 million charge resulting from the quarterly fair value remeasurement of outstanding performance-based stock compensation. This reduced diluted earnings per share and adjusted diluted earnings per share by $0.14 The third quarter of 2025 adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (adjusted EBITDA) was $3.2 billion, compared with $2.5 billion for the third quarter of 2024. Adjustments are shown in the accompanying release tables. “In the third quarter, Refining & Marketing delivered strong  Normalized numeric aliases: $915 million = 9억 1,500만 달러; $56 million = 5,600만 달러; $3.2 billion = 32억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $915 = 915달러; $3.01 = 3.01달러; $56 = 56달러; $0.14 = 0.14달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $3.2 = 3.2달러.

and optimize the portfolio, strengthening the durability of mid-single digit segment adjusted EBITDA growth. MPLX will provide $2.8 billion of annualized distributions to MPC that we expect to cover our dividends and standalone capital spending, and to be a source of capital allocation, a differentiator in the energy industry. Our integrated value chains and geographically diversified assets position us to lead in capital allocation.” 1 Results from Operations Adjusted EBITDA (unaudited) Three Months Ended September 30, Nine Months Ended September 30, (In millions) 2025 2024 2025  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.8 billion = 28억 달러; $2.8 = 2.8달러; $1,762 = 1,762달러; $1,136 = 1,136달러; $4,141 = 4,141달러; $5,144 = 5,144달러; 1,762 million = 17억 6,200만 달러; 1,136 million = 11억 3,600만 달러; 5,144 million = 51억 4,400만 달러; 3,415 million = 34억 1,500만 달러; 5,070 million = 50억 7,000만 달러; 4,837 million = 48억 3,700만 달러; 2,703 million = 27억 300만 달러; 9,094 million = 90억 9,400만 달러; 9,803 million = 98억 300만 달러.

64 75 Adjusted EBITDA $ 3,206 $ 2,507 $ 8,467 $ 9,203 Refining & Marketing (R&M) Segment adjusted EBITDA was $1.8 billion in the third quarter of 2025, versus $1.1 billion for the third quarter of 2024. R&M segment adjusted EBITDA was $6.37 per barrel for the third quarter of 2025, versus $4.15 per barrel for the third quarter of 2024. Segment adjusted EBITDA excludes refining planned turnaround costs, which totaled $400 million in the third quarter of 2025 and $287 million in the third quarter of 2024.
